author: Roaster Bot Contributors
name: Roaster
short: AI-powered roasts, TLDRs, and message analysis for Discord
description: Full-featured Discord bot that syncs messages to SQLite and roasts users via multiple AI providers (NVIDIA, Groq, OpenAI, Moonshot, DeepSeek, Z-AI, OpenRouter). Supports /roast, /tldr, ;ask, ;debate, hot takes, interactive settings UI, and per-guild configuration.
install_msg: Thank you for installing Roaster! Run `[p]setup` or `/setup` to launch the interactive setup wizard that will walk you through configuring API keys and testing endpoints step by step.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user messages for roasting and analysis purposes. Users can opt out via the /optout command. Stored data includes message content, author ID, and timestamps for channels explicitly configured by server admins.
